$comment: Nightly skill-eval roster. Skills are checked out READ-ONLY from source.githubRepo at the PINNED source.ref (never a moving branch) so every nightly run evaluates a reproducible skill corpus. Every listed skill must carry its own hand-authored eval-spec.yaml at <path>/eval-spec.yaml — scaffold-only specs don't qualify. Provider policy (2026-07-16): automated runs use cheap API-key providers only, never Anthropic keys. Default flipped deepseek→minimax 2026-07-17 (operator decision): the DeepSeek account is unfunded on our key while MiniMax is funded and carried the first green nightly (run 29545349026). `models` is the roster-level model override the runner applies whenever the provider differs from the model id pinned inside the specs (they pin deepseek-v4-flash, which other backends 404 on); a --models flag still wins over it.
